{{CargoRelic
|name=Haulers on Volga
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=07-18
|source=* Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (Relic RF 80), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
|description=On Jul 18, 1873, Ilya Repin created this painting that could represent the Russian spirit.

Repin spent two years creating this painting before he could successfully express the unique Russian identity. The painting features a group of ragged and exhausted trackers digging the cargo ship, struggling to move forward under the hot sun. The background is dark and gloomy, and the empty space creates a sense of melancholy and helplessness. It expresses the deep emotions of a tracker. On the burnt-yellow river bank, a lively youth in red is staring into the distance while basking his face under the sun. Repin expressed his pursuit of freedom in this painting.

[Basic Info]

Era: Tsardom of Russia<br>Size: 131.5x281 cm<br>Type: Oil on Canvas<br>Collected by: The State Russian Museum
|fame=39
|art=73
|fth=49
|civ=35
|tech=47
|ss1=The Pond has a +6% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade Wood cost -3%
|ss2=The Pond has a +8% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade Wood cost -4%
|ss3=The Pond has a +10% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade Wood cost -5%
|ss4=The Pond has a +14% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade Wood cost -7%
|ss5=The Pond has a +18% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade wood cost -9%
|ss7=The Pond has a +18% chance to produce W-tads<br>Tadpole Pond upgrade Wood cost -9%<br>The Pond has a +14% chance to produce W-tads (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]] Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +15%
|skill2=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]] Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +10
}}

[[Category:Tadpole Pond W-Tad Output Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Indigent Nobleman Relics]]
